<!--
SPDX-FileCopyrightText: 2026 Bruno Pacheco (https://bruno.pacheco.lu|brunopacheco1@yahoo.com)

SPDX-License-Identifier: CC-BY-4.0
-->
# Neologisms

::: {#refs}
:::

| Neologism | Definition | Formation Type | Etymology |
|-----------|------------|----------------|-----------|
| *carincë* | Chapter of a book. | Compound noun from words [car-](https://www.eldamo.org/content/words/word-3597380807.html?neo) and [-incë](https://www.eldamo.org/content/words/word-3809934845.html?neo). | [here](https://www.etymonline.com/search?q=chapter) |
